summary: The AI itinerary covers several key Yellowstone attractions and maintains a coherent day structure but fails significantly in wildlife timing and recovery time, both critical for client satisfaction. Improvements are essential in adhering to realistic drive times and geographic coherence.

dimension_scores.finding: Wildlife viewing is scheduled from 15:00 to 19:00, missing optimal dawn and dusk windows.
No explicit rest periods scheduled after early morning starts.
dimension_scores.example: Continuous activities from 7:00 to 21:30 on Day 2

dimension_scores.finding: Several drive times are underestimated, impacting schedule feasibility.
Days are generally kept within reasonable geographic zones.
dimension_scores.example: Day 4 focuses entirely on Grand Canyon of the Yellowstone and Yellowstone Lake.

dimension_scores.finding: Generally adheres to 2-3 headline experiences per day but misses on rest days and starts.
dimension_scores.example: Day 1 includes three headline experiences with no rest periods.

dimension_scores.finding: Fails to mention the overlook trail for Grand Prismatic Spring.
dimension_scores.example: 10:00-12:00 Grand Prismatic Spring | Early afternoon light intensifies colors on Fairy Falls Trail.

dimension_scores.finding: Departure day is correctly kept to just checkout and travel activities.

hits: Orientation session scheduled soon after arrival
misses: Evening stroll scheduled which contradicts no demanding evening activities
day_analysis.worst_mistake: Schedules evening wildlife spotting which is demanding after travel.

hits: Includes Old Faithful and Grand Prismatic which are key experiences
misses: Wildlife viewing in Lamar Valley scheduled after optimal times
No rest in afternoon despite early start
day_analysis.worst_mistake: Schedules wildlife watching at inappropriate times for optimal sightings.

day_analysis.golden_title: Grand Canyon of the Yellowstone + Hayden Sunset
hits: Includes Norris Geyser Basin and Mount Washburn
misses: No afternoon rest period despite early start and long hike
Norris late afternoon viewing is mentioned oddly in the morning
day_analysis.worst_mistake: No rest period after a demanding morning schedule.

day_analysis.golden_title: Geyser Loop — Old Faithful + Grand Prismatic
hits: Correctly schedules a visit to Yellowstone Lake and Grand Canyon
misses: Activities in the Grand Canyon missed colloquial reference to both Artist Point and Lower Falls
day_analysis.worst_mistake: Fails to ensure both Artist Point and Lower Falls are highlighted.

day_analysis.golden_title: Norris Geyser Basin + Yellowstone Lake — Balanced Day
hits: Includes Mammoth Hot Springs and Boiling River
day_analysis.worst_mistake: Includes too many activities without appropriate rest and realistic travel estimates.

misses: Early start time might not be necessary

top_failures.description: Failed to schedule wildlife viewing at appropriate dawn or dusk times, limiting potential sightings.
top_failures.prompt_fix: Incorporate 'Include wildlife viewing at dawn or dusk only' in nature activity scheduling.

top_failures.description: Misses critical rest periods especially given early start days, impacting visitor energy levels.
top_failures.prompt_fix: Mandate 1.5-hour rest block after any early morning or vigorous activity.

top_failures.description: Misses expert advice to use the overlook trail for best Grand Prismatic Spring viewing.
top_failures.prompt_fix: Add 'always include Grand Prismatic Spring Overlook' to tips section.

what_ai_got_right: Maintained a single base camp strategy at Canyon Lodge.
Did not schedule activities on departure day ensuring logistic focus.

itinerary_prompt_changes: Require explicit rest periods in itineraries that include early morning starts or extended activities.
Include specific guidance to schedule wildlife activities only during dawn or dusk times.
board_generation_changes: Ensure all 'must include' attractions like Artist Point and Hayden Valley appear in the suggestions.
Incorporate guidance on best viewing advice for attractions like Grand Prismatic Spring.
